basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Attender and Watchman cum Gardener Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India (CBI) Attender and Watchman cum Gardener Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website https://www.centralbankofindia.co.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CBI Attender and Watchman cum Gardener Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 39 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.details: Attender: Must be Matriculate. Should be well conversant with the local language. Should be resident of the same state/preferably same District. Watchman cum Gardener: Shall be 7th standard passed. Should be well conversant with the local language. Experience in agriculture/gardening/horticulture. Should be resident of the same state/preferably same District.

salary_details.details: Attender: Rs. 14000/- per month Watchman cum Gardener: Rs. 12000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.centralbankofindia.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Central Bank of India Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Central Bank of India Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. rows.event: Last Date of receipt of applications

content_sections.heading: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.centralbankofindia.co.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Attender and Watchman cum Gardener posts is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 22 years, and the maximum age limit is 39 years for all the posts announced by the Central Bank of India.

faq.question: Q3. Are there any application fees for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the Central Bank of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for the Attender and Watchman cum Gardener posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will primarily involve a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Attender post?
faq.answer: For the Attender position, candidates must be Matriculate. They should also be well-versed in the local language and preferably reside in the same district.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Watchman cum Gardener post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Watchman cum Gardener role, candidates must have passed the 7th standard. Experience in agriculture, gardening, or horticulture is also required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Attender and Watchman cum Gardener positions?
faq.answer: The Attender post offers a salary of Rs. 14000/- per month, while the Watchman cum Gardener post offers Rs. 12000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies released by Central Bank of India?
faq.answer: Central Bank of India has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Attender and Watchman cum Gardener in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Central Bank of India's official website. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
